title: Manufacturing Engineer - JSW Steel - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - JSW Steel - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, JSW Steel in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About JSW Steel:
JSW Steel is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JSW Steel!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
